full_text:
Liu You
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Youwas born in Kuaiji. Sent to give tribute to the Han court, which was under Cao Cao’s control. Liu You was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
